allow: Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u root -poral123 -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS listening; CREATE DATABASE listening CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")
